headline: Royal Caribbean Cruises and Other Consumer Discretionary Stocks to Sell
summary: The Invesco S&P 500 Equal Weight Consumer Discretionary Exchange-Traded-fund is down 13% from its record high in January, while the S&P 500 has risen to new highs this month.
